cast.name: 玛尔塔·丹琴格罗娃 Marta Dancingerová
斯捷潘·科祖布 Stepán Kozub

introduction: Ten-year-old Sasha ran away from home when he was suspected of setting fire to a barn with his friends. Seventeen-year-old Ruda escaped from the children's home because he attacked a nurse. They have met in the Sasha grandfather's garden house, and their paths would soon be divided if Sasha did not find out that it was Ruda who set the barn on fire and if he did not decide to force him to confess to the police so that he and his friends would not be punished. However, Ruda has not the slightest interest in confessing. He wants to go. Away from this country, far from his life so far after children's homes. And in order for Sasha not to thwart this plan, he will take it a bit like a "hostage"…
